chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2304 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 17-04-2025 Petitioner is called absent. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** On 10.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 17.04.2025 for which intimation notice be issued to the petitioner”. Today petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent; no intimation is received, which shows that he has lost interest in proceeding with this petition. Under the circumstances, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
